input_output_layout: L1 WIDTH_SHARDED, 90 shards of [32,128] per device

persistent_output_buffers.ping_pong_selection: decoder-owned modulo-2 index, one buffer for attention O and one for expert output in a token

observed_worker_cores_source: AllReduceAsyncDeviceOperation Cores column in both final S=17 decode tt-perf-report tables

chunks_per_sync.reason: The selected persistent-buffer all_reduce_async Python/C++ overload does not expose this knob.

num_buffers_per_channel.reason: The selected persistent-buffer all_reduce_async Python/C++ overload does not expose this knob.

separate_persistent_intermediate.reason: The only model-supplied intermediate/output tensor is the persistent buffer_tensor above; the overload exposes no additional intermediate tensor.
